title: Senior Plant Manager at Himalaya Drug Company

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Himalaya Drug Company
jsonLd.description:
Himalaya Drug Company has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Himalaya Drug Company:
Himalaya Drug Company is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Himalaya Drug Company!
